successCriteria.description: src/modules/policy/policy.service.ts exists and exports IPolicyService and PolicyService
PolicyService.getPolicy returns the active policy for a given leave type ID or throws a descriptive error if not found or inactive
PolicyService.validateRequest correctly enforces max_consecutive_days and blackout_dates from the policy, returning { valid: false, errors: [...] } for violations
Unit tests in tests/unit/modules/policy/policy.service.test.ts cover all validation branches (valid request, consecutive days exceeded, blackout date conflict, missing policy) and pass with Jest

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces (PolicyService uses IPolicyRepository).
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections; async errors must be thrown or caught appropriately.
outOfScope: Creating policy.model.ts and policy.repository.ts (already exist from Phase 2).
Phases 5-10 (balance, notification, leave request, orchestration, wiring, controllers, routes).
Any API endpoints, controllers, or HTTP routes.
Integration with leave, balance, notification, or employee modules.
UI components or React Native code.
